overlay_surfaces.known_collision: Can stack with comments, steward gate, and confirmation affordances without a shared lifecycle registry.

known_gap.summary: Detail modal lifecycle metadata is thin for stacked overlays.
known_gap.recommended_action: Add Playwright open, close, escape, and focus coverage after the inventory contract is established.

overlay_surfaces.recommended_action: Keep current behavior and validate stacked overlay lifecycle.

overlay_surfaces.open_trigger: chat action or floating chat button
overlay_surfaces.known_collision: Chat panel can intercept create controls when open.
overlay_surfaces.state_source: HeapBlockGrid chat panel state and chat socket state

known_gap.summary: Chat hydration and socket failures can be under-observed while the panel remains interactive.
known_gap.recommended_action: Expose chat hydration, socket, and overlay collision status in a shared overlay lifecycle contract.

overlay_surfaces.recommended_action: Add overlay smoke coverage for chat open, close, and create-control collision.

overlay_surfaces.known_collision: Comment sidebar can visually stack over Heap detail content.

known_gap.summary: Comment annotations are local-only, but the overlay surface does not visibly label persistence scope.
known_gap.recommended_action: Keep comment authority local-only and add overlay state provenance metadata.

overlay_surfaces.recommended_action: Validate local-only authority and close behavior.

overlay_surfaces.known_collision: Can be opened from detail context without a central stack registry.
overlay_surfaces.state_source: HeapBlockGrid steward gate state and steward validation response
overlay_surfaces.recommended_action: Classify as steward-gated write and require explicit validation evidence before behavior changes.

overlay_surfaces.known_collision: Shares z-50 band with detail and chat surfaces.
overlay_surfaces.recommended_action: Add smoke coverage for close behavior and z-index collision with Heap detail surfaces.

overlay_surfaces.known_collision: Shares z-130 band with shared confirmation modal.
overlay_surfaces.recommended_action: Keep settings-like ownership on Heap until global settings IA exists.

overlay_surfaces.known_collision: History can be launched from detail context without a typed stack contract.
overlay_surfaces.recommended_action: Track runtime read status and empty/error states in overlay smoke coverage.

overlay_surfaces.open_trigger: create action or floating create button
overlay_surfaces.known_collision: Create controls can be intercepted by the chat panel when both are open.
overlay_surfaces.recommended_action: Add collision smoke coverage before changing Heap create/chat layout.

overlay_surfaces.known_collision: Mobile shell overlay and popovers share shell z-index bands.
overlay_surfaces.recommended_action: Track shell popover ownership separately from settings IA.

overlay_surfaces.known_collision: Role selector affects navigation affordances but is not global settings.
overlay_surfaces.recommended_action: Preserve as shell-owned until global settings IA is implemented.

overlay_surfaces.known_collision: Uses shell-level z-100 band without shared overlay registry.
overlay_surfaces.recommended_action: Keep naming modal as shell-owned local UI state.

overlay_surfaces.open_trigger: saved view rename or delete action
overlay_surfaces.known_collision: Shares confirmation band with shared destructive confirmation modal.
overlay_surfaces.recommended_action: Keep absence of global settings explicit and owner-route scoped.

overlay_surfaces.known_collision: Provider sheets expose operator-only mutation context and need route-level provenance.

known_gap.summary: Provider/operator sheets need explicit route-level redaction and identity provenance.
known_gap.recommended_action: Attach operator boundary, identity, and redaction metadata before expanding provider sheet capabilities.

overlay_surfaces.recommended_action: Validate operator-only route guard and provenance metadata.

overlay_surfaces.known_collision: Provider details can expose topology, binding, and runtime health data.
overlay_surfaces.recommended_action: Keep provider detail surface operator-only and redacted by route policy.

overlay_surfaces.known_collision: Discovery sheets may reveal local runtime topology.
overlay_surfaces.recommended_action: Require explicit operator provenance before making discovery state more visible.

overlay_surfaces.open_trigger: artifact row select or workflow artifact action
overlay_surfaces.known_collision: Artifact inspector has console-only workflow action behavior that is not a real surface action.

known_gap.summary: Artifact inspector includes a console-only workflow action placeholder.
known_gap.recommended_action: Classify the action as placeholder now and remove or implement it in a later workflow surface pass.

overlay_surfaces.recommended_action: Add workflow inspector smoke after contract stabilization.

overlay_surfaces.known_collision: Nested artifact panels lack a typed lifecycle stack.
overlay_surfaces.recommended_action: Keep as runtime-read projection until workflow action authority is formalized.

overlay_surfaces.known_collision: Nested checkpoint panels lack a typed lifecycle stack.
overlay_surfaces.recommended_action: Track empty/error projection states before adding replay mutations.

overlay_surfaces.known_collision: Replay affordance may imply mutation, but current contract classifies it as read/placeholder.
overlay_surfaces.recommended_action: Do not grant replay mutation authority in this stage.

overlay_surfaces.known_collision: Confirmation can stack over multiple route-owned overlays.
overlay_surfaces.recommended_action: Preserve explicit destructive confirmation contract and add escape/focus coverage.

known_gaps.summary: Chat panel can intercept create controls.
known_gaps.recommended_action: Add Playwright coverage and shared lifecycle metadata for Heap create/chat overlay collisions.

known_gaps.summary: Overlay lifecycle metadata is thin across modals, drawers, sheets, and popovers.
known_gaps.recommended_action: Introduce a shared overlay lifecycle contract before redesigning overlay behavior.

known_gaps.summary: Chat hydration and socket failures can be under-observed.
known_gaps.recommended_action: Expose hydration, socket, and retry state in the chat overlay contract.

known_gaps.summary: Provider/operator sheets need route-level redaction and identity provenance.
known_gaps.recommended_action: Attach operator boundary and redaction metadata to provider sheet observability.

known_gaps.summary: Artifact inspector has a console-only workflow action placeholder.
known_gaps.recommended_action: Classify as placeholder now and either implement or remove in a later workflow surface pass.

next_validation_targets: Provider create/detail/discovery sheet operator boundary smoke
Saved-view modal and destructive confirmation smoke
Workflow artifact inspector and trace/checkpoint/replay placeholder smoke
